description: Lock the advanced_materials_science node to postwar materials science and engineering rather than computational materials discovery or generic advanced materials.

checks.reason: The node is scoped to the 1950s emergence of materials science and engineering as a discipline.
Chemistry remains an enabling foundation for the discipline.
Quantum and solid-state physics remain enabling foundations for materials science.
Expanded engineered material classes are lineage context for the discipline, not a hard prerequisite.
